description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of yellow mustard, adding a vibrant contrast to the warm tones of the bun and sausage. The hot dog is presented in a simple, rectangular paper tray with orange sides and white interior, which helps contain any drips or crumbs. The bun appears fluffy and slightly glossy, while the sausage has a smooth, slightly shiny surface. The mustard is applied evenly along the length of the sausage, and no other condiments or toppings are visible. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of street food or concession stand fare.
description: A classic hot dog with mustard in a paper tray, featuring a soft bun and plump sausage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hot dog in its tray, with the bun and sausage visible and mustard zigzagged on top.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full length of the sausage and the even application of mustard.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the bun and sausage from the opposite side with mustard visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the mustard and the bun's split.
